steps.title: Protect the main verb
steps.content: The main verb of the sentence is became: such meticulous documentation became Kawara's life's work. The blank should add a modifying phrase about producing artworks, not introduce another finite main verb before became.

steps.title: Reject competing verbs
steps.content: Choice A creates a comma splice with has generated and became. Choice B makes generates a second main verb. Choice D reads as another past-tense main verb before became. The answer is C.
